name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection
notes: This building block detects suspicious incoming connections to the svchost.exe process.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of svchost.exe
when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of false
when the event matches "sourceport" >= 49152 AND "destinationport" >= 49152 AQL filter query
when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.1
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of svchost.exe
AND when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of false
AND when the event matches "sourceport" >= 49152 AND "destinationport" >= 49152 AQL filter query
AND NOT when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.1
